prd_meta.title: Latency reduction PRD: POST /analyze (company-specific finance path)
prd_meta.description: Product requirements derived from latency_audit_results.md (AAPL, COMPANY_SPECIFIC_FINANCE handler). Optimize server-side and perceived latency by addressing bottlenecks in order of impact.
prd_meta.sorting_rule: milestones are ordered by impact_level (HIGH before MEDIUM), then by sort_order descending estimated_effect within the same level
prd_meta.baseline_policy: Do not use frozen baseline numbers from the audit. Before each milestone is measured, record fresh before_* values using the shared measurement context. After implementation, record after_* on the same procedure. seconds_saved = step_metric.duration_before_seconds - step_metric.duration_after_seconds (or null until both recorded).
prd_meta.release_and_measurement_policy: Ship exactly one milestone (one user-visible optimization) per release cycle for latency work. Each release contains a single merged PR for that milestone so manual SSE before/after measures only that change. Do not combine multiple milestones from this PRD in one production deploy if the goal is clean per-step seconds_saved attribution. Branches and prep work for the next milestone may proceed in parallel, but merge and measure one at a time.

default_measurement_context.question: What is Apple's revenue trend over the last 3 years?
default_measurement_context.notes: Keep ticker, question, and model selection identical between before and after runs for comparable step and total timings. If env flags differ, document them in measurement notes.

dependency_terminology.technical_must_complete_before: Milestone B cannot be implemented or safely shipped until A is done because of code/API contract.
dependency_terminology.measurement_order_note: If two milestones touch the same timer span, they must not ship in the same release—see release_and_measurement_policy. That replaces ad-hoc feature flags for attribution unless a flag is used to dark-launch a single change.
dependency_terminology.parallelizable: No technical code-order constraint; different people may work on different milestones in parallel on separate branches. Shipping/measurement still follows one milestone per release for clear gain measurement.

milestones.title: Run search decision on a fast classifier model (e.g. Gemini 3.0 Flash) instead of Sonnet 4.6
milestones.estimated_effect_from_audit: 4s+ wall-clock reduction on search_decision_engine.decide; avoids 5s timeout path described in audit
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §3 search_decision_engine.decide
Optimization Impact Matrix: Switch search decision to Gemini Flash
Quick Wins #2
milestones.definition: Replace or reconfigure the search decision LLM so the decide step completes quickly enough that the asyncio.gather parallel block is not dominated by a Sonnet call timing out at 5s.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: The audit shows search_decision_engine.decide ran ~5.25s and hit the 5s timeout while classify_question_type ran in parallel. Implementers should locate the OpenRouter/Sonnet usage for search decision, choose a faster model appropriate for binary/small classification, preserve behavior tests for search on/off, and add timing logs or reuse existing trace points. Work can span sessions: leave TODOs where integration points need confirmation. Other search-decision milestones ship in separate releases per release_and_measurement_policy—do not merge overlapping edits into one deploy.
milestones.optimized_pipeline_step: search_decision_engine.decide (wall-clock within PARALLEL: classify + search decision)

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with search-decision-offline-when-db-sufficient (same search/TTFT surface). Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Search decision no longer relies on Sonnet 4.6 for the default path (or documented exception with rationale).
Behavior for forcing search on/off remains correct for fixtures or manual spot-checks used by the team.

step_specific_metric.name: search_decision span
step_specific_metric.description: Duration attributable to search_decision_engine.decide for this request (prefer server-side instrumentation or trace line matching the audit; if unavailable, use wall-clock of parallel block minus classify-only estimate only with documented method).
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Run default_measurement_context. Capture step_metric.duration_before_seconds before merge. Deploy change. Capture step_metric.duration_after_seconds with same context. Compute seconds_saved.

total_request_metric.description: Optional: total server or HTTP time for the same manual run (helps sanity-check).

milestones.title: When DB already has sufficient data, avoid Google Search / :online generation path (fix reliability + fast-path)
milestones.estimated_effect_from_audit: 3-5s TTFT reduction if :online is skipped when DB-backed context suffices; depends on current routing
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §1 LLM Generation TTFT (Skip Google Search bullet)
Top Bottlenecks §3 (keyword fast-path, reduce timeout bullets)
Optimization Impact Matrix: Fix search decision → skip Google Search when DB sufficient
Quick Wins #3
milestones.definition: Ensure the pipeline does not enable the Gemini :online / Google Search-backed generation path when persisted financial data already covers the question, and that search decision does not fall back to search=ON solely due to timeout if DB coverage is adequate. Includes expanding deterministic keyword/heuristic fast-paths and tuning timeout/fail-safe behavior as described in the audit.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: The audit hypothesized search=ON because Sonnet timed out, inflating TTFT for :online. This milestone is about correct routing logic, not only model speed. Implementation may touch search_decision_engine, handler wiring for online vs offline model IDs, and guards keyed on available periods/metrics. Keyword fast-path and timeout tuning belong here if they serve the same goal: correct OFFLINE answer when DB is enough. Multi-session safe: document invariants (what 'sufficient' means) in code comments or a short module docstring.
milestones.optimized_pipeline_step: LLM generation TTFT and choice of :online vs offline model; indirectly search_decision outcome quality

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with search-decision-model-gemini-flash. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: For the default_measurement_context with DB populated for AAPL, generation uses non-online path when policy says DB suffices (assert via logs, model id, or integration test).
Heuristic/keyword fast-path and timeout behavior documented and covered by at least one automated or scripted check if feasible.

step_specific_metric.name: LLM TTFT (first answer token latency)
step_specific_metric.description: Time from start of model_generate_content (or equivalent) to first answer SSE chunk; must reflect removal of unnecessary :online when DB sufficient.
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Same manual run context. Record TTFT before change, after change, and compute seconds_saved for this step. Optionally record total_request duration in total_request_metric fields.

total_request_metric.description: End-to-end HTTP or server total for the manual run.

milestones.title: Regex/keyword pre-filter before ticker_extractor.extract_tickers LLM
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §2 ticker_extractor.extract_tickers
Optimization Impact Matrix: Regex pre-filter for ticker extraction
Quick Wins #1
milestones.definition: Before invoking the LLM inside ticker extraction, detect absence of comparison signals (e.g. vs, compare, versus, multiple tickers) via regex/heuristics and skip the LLM call when safe.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Audit shows extract_tickers dominated classify_question_type time. Add a fast pre-filter in the ticker extraction path; ensure comparison questions still invoke the LLM. Add tests for boundary cases (false negatives are worse than false positives for skipping). Can be developed independently of search decision work.

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with ticker-extraction-parallel-with-classification. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Non-comparison default_measurement_context skips LLM extract_tickers path (verified by log or test).
Known comparison-style prompts still call LLM or equivalent comparison detection.

step_specific_metric.name: extract_tickers span
step_specific_metric.description: Wall-clock or instrumented duration for ticker_extractor.extract_tickers for the request.
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Manual run before/after; fill step_metric and seconds_saved.

total_request_metric.description: Optional total duration for same context.

milestones.title: Reduce prompt size for main financial answer generation (TTFT)
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §1 (Reduce prompt size bullet)
Optimization Impact Matrix: Reduce prompt size for main generation
milestones.definition: Compress or trim instructions and financial context formatting so the main generation call sends fewer tokens without losing required facts.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Focus on prompt templates and context builders feeding model_generate_content. Measure TTFT impact; avoid unrelated refactors. Multi-session: track which templates were shortened in PR description.

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with search-decision-offline-when-db-sufficient (same TTFT). Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Documented token or character count reduction vs prior, or qualitative template list changed.
No loss of required financial fields per reviewer checklist.

step_specific_metric.name: Main LLM TTFT
step_specific_metric.description: Time to first answer token for main generation only.
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Same manual context; record step TTFT before/after and seconds_saved.

milestones.title: Streaming-first architecture: yield partial results earlier in the pipeline
milestones.estimated_effect_from_audit: Not quantified in matrix; qualitative perceived latency improvement
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §1 (Consider streaming-first architecture bullet)
milestones.definition: Restructure SSE flow so the client receives useful events (status, partial outline, or early tokens) sooner, even if total work is unchanged.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: May require API contract awareness (frontend expectations). Coordinate across backend/frontend if event schema changes. Measure perceived latency (first non-status user-valuable byte) in addition to server timers if agreed.
milestones.optimized_pipeline_step: Client-perceived time to first meaningful SSE payload (define explicitly in measurement notes)

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with related-questions-parallel-with-answer-stream if SSE ordering conflicts. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Documented definition of 'first partial yield' for this feature.
Frontend/backward compatibility verified if SSE shape changed.

step_specific_metric.name: Time to first meaningful SSE (per milestone definition)
step_specific_metric.description: Record the metric agreed by team (e.g. first answer chunk vs first structured partial).
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Manual capture before/after; seconds_saved on that definition.

milestones.title: Run ticker extraction concurrently with classification (not sequentially inside classify_question_type)
milestones.estimated_effect_from_audit: Not given as isolated seconds; reduces classify_question_type wall-clock if dependencies allow
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §2 (Move to parallel bullet)
milestones.definition: Refactor classify_question_type so ticker_extractor work runs in parallel with other independent steps where safe, instead of blocking the rest of classification.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Requires analyzing data dependencies between ticker extraction output and classifier. Do not parallelize if classification truly depends on ticker list order. Document dependency graph in PR.
milestones.optimized_pipeline_step: classify_question_type wall-clock (includes extract_tickers if still nested)

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with ticker-extraction-regex-prefilter. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Dependency analysis written (why parallelization is safe).
No regression on comparison vs single-ticker classification cases.

step_specific_metric.name: classify_question_type total span
step_specific_metric.description: Wall-clock for classify_question_type phase as in audit.

total_request_metric.description: Optional parallel block (classify + search decision) wall-clock.

milestones.title: Merge or parallelize classify_data_requirement and classify_period_requirement
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §4 classify_data_requirement + classify_period_requirement
Optimization Impact Matrix: Merge data_req + period_req classifiers
milestones.definition: Replace two sequential LLM calls with either one merged call returning both decisions, or two parallel calls, preserving downstream behavior.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Pick merge vs parallel based on coupling of outputs. Update prompts and parsers. Single milestone to avoid double-counting savings in planning.

implementation_checks: Downstream fetch uses equivalent or better data/period selection on test cases.
Single or parallel architecture documented.

step_specific_metric.name: data + period classification span
step_specific_metric.description: Sum or single span matching new architecture vs old sequential sum.
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Manual before/after; seconds_saved for combined step.

milestones.title: Skip _analyze_question_dimensions for simple questions (default sections)
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §5 _analyze_question_dimensions (Skip for simple questions bullet)
Optimization Impact Matrix: Skip _analyze_question_dimensions for simple questions
milestones.definition: When the question is classified as simple or non-deep-analysis, bypass the dimensions LLM and use deterministic default section titles/structure.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Define 'simple' using existing flags or classifier output. Avoid skipping when deep_analysis or equivalent requires rich structure.

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with other analyze-question-dimensions-* milestones. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Simple path skips LLM call (log/test).
Deep/complex path still invokes dimensions analysis when required.

step_specific_metric.name: _analyze_question_dimensions span
step_specific_metric.description: Duration of dimensions step; for simple questions should trend to ~0 when skipped.

milestones.title: Cache common dimension patterns (revenue trend, margins, etc.)
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §5 (Cache common patterns bullet)
Optimization Impact Matrix: Cache common dimension patterns
milestones.definition: Memoize or key-cache LLM dimension outputs for repeated question shapes so identical or near-identical questions reuse structure without a full LLM round trip.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Choose cache key (normalized question + handler + ticker). Invalidate on model/prompt version change. Thread-safe if multi-worker.

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with other analyze-question-dimensions-* milestones. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Cache hit/miss observable in logs or metrics.
Versioning or invalidation strategy documented.

step_specific_metric.name: _analyze_question_dimensions span on cache hit vs miss
step_specific_metric.description: Record before/after for cold vs warm question if testing cache; primary comparison is second identical request after first.
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Document which run is before (no cache) and after (cache hit); seconds_saved on dimensions step.

milestones.title: Use cheaper/faster model for _analyze_question_dimensions
milestones.estimated_effect_from_audit: Qualitative; not separately quantified in matrix
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §5 (Use cheaper/faster model bullet)
milestones.definition: Swap the model used for dimension analysis to a smaller/faster Gemini (or equivalent) while preserving output schema for downstream code.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Validate JSON/schema stability. Compare quality on a small golden set of questions.

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with other analyze-question-dimensions-* milestones. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Model id configurable or updated with rollback path.
Golden-question review passed.

milestones.title: Generate Chart.js (or chart payload) outside main answer stream
milestones.estimated_effect_from_audit: Reduces streaming token count; not given as isolated seconds in matrix
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §6 LLM streaming duration (Generate chart separately bullet)
milestones.definition: Move chart generation to a follow-up LLM call, tool step, or client-side composition so the main answer stream is shorter.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: May require frontend contract for loading chart after text. Coordinate if API adds new SSE event types.
milestones.optimized_pipeline_step: LLM generation streaming duration (post-TTFT) for main answer

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with main-generation-streaming-first-partial-yields if SSE contract changes overlap. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: Main stream token count reduced or duration reduced on benchmark question.
Chart still renders correctly in product.

step_specific_metric.name: Main answer streaming duration (after first token)
step_specific_metric.description: Duration from first answer token to end of main answer for default context.

total_request_metric.description: Optional total including follow-up chart step if separate.

milestones.title: Start related_questions generation earlier (parallel with answer streaming or post-classify)
source_audit_sections: Top Bottlenecks §7 related_questions
Optimization Impact Matrix: Parallelize related_questions with streaming
milestones.definition: Overlap related_questions LLM work with answer streaming or earlier pipeline stages once inputs are available, instead of strictly after answer completes.
milestones.explanation_for_agents: Ensure thread-safety and ordering of SSE events. Frontend must handle out-of-order related_questions if emitted before answer end.
milestones.optimized_pipeline_step: related_questions (time until related questions ready vs end-to-end perceived)

dependencies.measurement_order_note: Do not co-ship with main-generation-streaming-first-partial-yields if SSE ordering conflicts. Per release_and_measurement_policy.

implementation_checks: related_questions completes earlier relative to wall-clock than baseline, or perceived latency improves per measurement definition.
No duplicate or corrupted SSE ordering in client.

step_specific_metric.name: Time from request start to related_questions ready (or time saved vs sequential baseline)
step_specific_metric.description: Define whether optimizing wall-clock total or time to first related question event.
step_specific_metric.how_to_record_before_after: Manual before/after; seconds_saved per chosen definition; optionally fill total_request_metric.

total_request_metric.description: Total HTTP time for manual run.
